commands.review_summary:
The PR pre-resolves omitted Telegram outbound account IDs through the configured default account and adds focused unit coverage for omitted-default and explicit-account selection.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +44. Total +46 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main resolves omitted Telegram account IDs as the implicit default before consulting the configured default when that implicit account has credentials. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
